nasb.text: Gathering together all the chief priests and scribes of the people, he inquired of them where the Messiah was to be born.

esv.text: and assembling all the chief priests and scribes of the people, he inquired of them where the Christ was to be born.

cnv.text: 他就召集所有的祭司長和民間的經學家，問他們基督應該生在哪裡。

ccb.text: 希律王就召来祭司长和律法教师，问他们：“基督在哪里降生呢？”

csbs.text: 希律就召集了所有的祭司长和民间的经文士，向他们询问基督诞生在哪里。
